title: senna odorata
intro: Senna odorata, also known as stinking senna or yellow cassia, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Senna odorata lie in its ability to act as a laxative and purgative, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna odorata include relief from constipation, improved digestion, and a reduction in symptoms associated with irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, where it is valued for its therapeutic properties.
